creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue Dec 31 02:53:27 2013
New Revision: 338215
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338215

Log:
  - Update to 2.0.3
  - While I'm here, update LICENSE
  
  Changes:	http://pear.php.net/package/Net_URL2/download/
  PR:		ports/185293
  Submitted by:	Joe Horn <joehorn@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/net/pear-Net_URL2/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/pear-Net_URL2/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/net/pear-Net_URL2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/pear-Net_URL2/Makefile	Tue Dec 31 02:19:59 2013	(r338214)
+++ head/net/pear-Net_URL2/Makefile	Tue Dec 31 02:53:27 2013	(r338215)
@@ -2,13 +2,13 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Net_URL2
-PORTVERSION=	2.0.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.3
 CATEGORIES=	net www pear
 
 MAINTAINER=	joehorn@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	PEAR Class for parsing and handling URL
 
-LICENSE=	BSD
+LICENSE=	BSD3CLAUSE
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PEARDIR}/PEAR.php:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PEARDIR}/PEAR.php:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear
